gallery.title: The Gallery
gallery.subtitle: The initial visionaries who defied the laws of physics and gravity.

unicorns.name: Barnaby "Moonshot"
unicorns.title: CEO of MEOWAI
unicorns.quote: "We aren't just chasing laser pointers; we're building the laser pointers of the future."

unicorns.name: Luna "Stargazer"
unicorns.title: CTO of PurrTech
unicorns.quote: "Every rooftop is a trampoline — you just need to know when to jump."

unicorns.name: Pixel "Disrupto"
unicorns.title: Founder of NapStack
unicorns.quote: "Napping isn't laziness — it's creative process optimization."

unicorns.name: Whiskers "The Brain"
unicorns.title: VP of FishCoin
unicorns.quote: "The fish market is like a ball of yarn — tangled, but full of opportunity."

unicorns.name: Cleo "Velvet"
unicorns.title: CMO of CatNipDAO
unicorns.quote: "Marketing is purring — subtle, but impossible to ignore."

catsTrap.title: The Cats-Trap Story
catsTrap.subtitle: From humble alleyways to high-valuation skyscrapers. Meet the elite minds behind the movement.

founders.name: Sir Whiskers III
founders.bio: "Pioneered the 'If I fits, I sits' logistics model, optimizing last-mile delivery through cardboard boxes."

founders.name: Mruczek von Dach
founders.bio: "Architected the world's first decentralized catnip delivery network using rooftop jumps and nocturnal navigation."

founders.name: Princess Fluffernutter
founders.bio: "Known for her 'tough love' approach to seed funding. Only invests in cats with high jump metrics and low nap-to-work ratios."

stories.text: The journey to unicorn status began on the cold slate of the East Side lofts. For Apollo, it wasn't about the view; it was about the signal strength. By bridging the gap between satellite dishes, he created the first cross-city feline communication protocol.
While the world slept, Selina was building. Her nocturnal algorithms predicted the 2023 fish market crash three weeks before the first tremor. She doesn't use the cloud; she owns the sky.
